chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 25 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.89/2024 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 22.04.2024 Mr. Raja Altaf Hussain Shar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- By consent, this constitutional petition is disposed of in the terms whereby petitioner is to pay Rs.5,000/- (Rupees five thousand) per month towards maintenance of his child and Rs.5,000/- (Rupees five thousand) per month towards outstanding maintenance since 20.06.2022 till the same is cleared off. If petitioner fails to deposit the said amount in the Family Court till 10th of each month, the Family Court would be competent to issue NBWs against him and execute the decree in accordance with law. Petition is disposed of along with listed application, in above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
